vision_profile.current_state: You are eager to start a career in HR operations, understanding the importance of efficient processes and data in managing human capital.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Your biggest obstacle is gaining practical skills in data handling, automation, and the analytical tools increasingly vital for modern HR operations.
vision_profile.top_motivation: You are motivated to leverage technology to streamline HR workflows, improve employee experiences, and contribute to data-driven decision-making within an organization.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can write basic Python scripts to automate simple HR tasks and handle structured data.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building the essential technical foundation to transform HR operations.
